# Step 4 — Workflow Actions (Approve / Reject / Return)

> The set of actions available to the Purchase Officer to advance, reject, or return a PR. Available from both the read-only detail view and edit mode. The primary action observed in the live UI is **Approve** (which advances the PR to the next approval stage). **Reject** and **Return** were not observed on the captured PR — see the discrepancy note below.

![Approve Dialog Visible](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 4.1 Access Path

```
PR Detail (step-02) or Edit Mode (step-03) → action button in top-right header
```

URL: `/procurement/purchase-request/{uuid}` (no URL change on action)

---

## 4.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> detail["2. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode - Vendor and Pricing"]
    edit --> actions["4. Workflow Actions - Approve / Reject / Send for Review"]
    actions --> done(["PR Advanced or Returned"])
    style actions fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 4.3 Button Visibility State Matrix

| Button | PR at Purchase stage | PR at other stage | Edit Mode active |
|--------|---------------------|------------------|-----------------|
| **Approve** | ✅ Visible | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Visible |
| **Reject** | ✅ Per BRD (TBC in UI) | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Per BRD (TBC) |
| **Return** | ✅ Per BRD (TBC in UI) | ❌ Hidden | ✅ Per BRD (TBC) |
| **Edit** | ✅ Visible | ❌ Hidden | N/A (already in edit) |
| **Comment** | ✅ Always | ✅ Always | ✅ Always |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD (FR-PR-005A) specifies that Purchasing Staff should have **Reject**, **Return**, and **Submit** buttons. The live UI on the captured PR (PR20260400060, Purchase stage) showed only **Approve** — no Reject or Return buttons were visible. Possible explanations:
> 1. The "Approve" button is the UI label for what BRD calls "Submit" (advancing PR to next stage).
> 2. Reject and Return buttons appear only when the PR is at a specific sub-stage or has specific conditions.
> 3. The button set differs by user role — this purchaser account may have a combined HOD+Purchaser role.
>
> **Action required:** Verify with the development team (a) what "Approve" triggers for Purchasing Staff, and (b) under what conditions Reject/Return appear.

---

## 4.4 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Visibility:** Approve is confirmed visible at Purchase stage. Reject and Return are specified in BRD (FR-PR-005A) but were not observed in the live UI for this PR — see discrepancy note in §4.3.

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Available: Purchase Stage | Available: Other Stage | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|--------------------------|----------------------|--------------------|
| **Approve** | Green / Primary | ✅ Visible | ❌ Hidden | Advance the PR to the next workflow stage — use when vendor/pricing allocation is complete and the PR is ready for financial review |
| **Reject** | Red / Destructive | ✅ Per BRD (TBC in UI) | ❌ Hidden | Permanently decline the PR — use when the request cannot be fulfilled; Creator cannot resubmit a rejected PR |
| **Return** | Outline / Secondary | ✅ Per BRD (TBC in UI) | ❌ Hidden | Send the PR back to an earlier stage for correction — use when the Creator or HOD must revise before purchasing can proceed |
| **Comment** | Outline | ✅ Always | ✅ Always | Add an internal note without changing workflow state — use for questions, clarifications, or audit trail notes |

### On Approve

**Purpose / Use Case:** Move a priced and vendor-allocated PR forward to FC review. Triggers a notification to the next approver.

> Clicking Approve opens a floating confirmation panel (top-right overlay). Exact dialog content was not fully captured — optional comment field and Confirm / Cancel actions expected per FR-PR-005A.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR is at a stage this user can act on | FR-PR-005A | Approve dialog shown; PR advances to next stage | Button not visible |
| 2 | All required vendor/pricing fields complete | FR-PR-011A | PR advances; status stays IN PROGRESS | TBC — no hard gate observed in UI |
| 3 | Comment captured if entered | FR-PR-005 | Comment recorded in audit log | — |
| 4 | PR not locked by another user | FR-PR-011 | Action proceeds | TBC — lock indicator not confirmed |

**Approve confirmation panel (partially captured — top-right overlay):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Type | Floating confirmation panel (top-right overlay) |
| Comment field | Optional — captured in audit log if entered |
| **Confirm** | Blue/Primary button — advances PR to next approval stage; status stays IN PROGRESS |
| **Cancel** | Outline/Grey button — closes panel, no action taken |

> Dialog content not fully captured in live UI. Structure above is based on partial observation + FR-PR-005A.

### On Reject

**Purpose / Use Case:** Permanently deny the PR when the request cannot be justified or fulfilled.

> BRD specifies this action for Purchasing Staff (FR-PR-005A) but Reject was not observed in the live UI on the captured PR. Content below is per BRD.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR is at a stage this user can reject | FR-PR-005A | Dialog shown | Button not visible |
| 2 | Comment entered with at least 10 characters | FR-PR-005 | PR status → VOID; notification sent to requestor | "Comment is required (minimum 10 characters)" |

**Reject dialog (BRD-specified — not confirmed in live UI):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | **Reject Purchase Request** (BRD name — TBC) |
| Comment field | Required — minimum 10 characters |
| **Reject** | Red/destructive button — PR status → VOID; notification sent to Creator |
| **Cancel** | Outline/Grey button — closes dialog, no action |

### On Return

**Purpose / Use Case:** Route the PR back to an earlier stage when the Creator or HOD must correct or provide more information before purchasing can proceed.

> BRD specifies this action (FR-PR-005A) but Return was not observed in the live UI on the captured PR. Content below is per BRD.

**Return destinations available to Purchasing Staff:**

| Destination | Sends PR To |
|-------------|------------|
| Request Creation | Back to Requestor (IN PROGRESS at Request stage) |
| Department Approval | Back to HOD |

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Return destination selected | FR-PR-005 | Proceeds | "Please select a return destination" |
| 2 | Comment entered with at least 10 characters | FR-PR-005 | PR routed to selected stage; notification sent | "Comment required (minimum 10 characters)" |
| 3 | PR is at a stage this user can return | FR-PR-005A | Dialog shown | Button not visible |

**Return dialog (BRD-specified — not confirmed in live UI):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Return destination | Dropdown — "Request Creation" (back to Creator) or "Department Approval" (back to HOD) |
| Comment field | Required — minimum 10 characters |
| **Confirm** | Blue/Primary button — routes PR to selected stage; notification sent to recipient |
| **Cancel** | Outline/Grey button — closes dialog, no action |

### On Comment

**Purpose / Use Case:** Add an internal note or question to the PR thread without advancing or reverting the workflow.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Comment text is not empty | FR-PR-008 | Comment added to thread with author name, role, and timestamp | Submit button inactive |

> Comments are internal only (not visible to vendors). Rich text support TBC per FR-PR-008.

---

## 4.9 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | Approve (Submit) by Purchasing Staff advances PR to next workflow stage (FC review) | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-02 | If no more approval stages pending after Purchasing Staff action → PR status → APPROVED | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-03 | Reject requires comment ≥ 10 characters | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-04 | Return requires comment ≥ 10 characters and a valid destination stage | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-05 | All actions logged in activity trail with user, timestamp, and comments | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-06 | Notifications sent to appropriate users upon action completion within 5 minutes | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-07 | On Reject: soft budget commitment released within 1 hour | FR-PR-004 |
| BR-08 | On Return: PR status remains IN PROGRESS at the earlier stage | FR-PR-005 |

---

## 4.10 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Purchaser clicks Approve without saving vendor/pricing changes | If unsaved Edit Mode changes exist, behaviour TBC — system may prompt to save first |
| Purchaser submits Reject comment with exactly 9 characters | Validation error shown; dialog stays open |
| PR is at FC stage (Purchaser already acted) | Approve/Reject/Return buttons not shown; view-only |
| Notification email to next approver fails | PR advances but approver does not receive email; retry mechanism TBC (FR-PR-005) |
| Two purchasing staff members attempt to act on the same PR simultaneously | Edit locking expected per FR-PR-011; second user should see "locked by" indicator |
| Purchaser acts on PR and then realizes pricing data was wrong | No undo available; must wait for return from FC or create new PR (TBC) |
| PR approved by Purchasing Staff but FC is unavailable | PR waits at FC stage; no timeout mechanism in BRD v1.9 |

---

## 4.11 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Approve confirmed | PR List — PR status now IN PROGRESS at FC stage |
| Approve cancelled | → Remains on PR Detail (step-02) |
| Reject confirmed | PR List — PR status now VOID |
| Return confirmed | PR List — PR back at selected earlier stage |
| Comment submitted | Stays on PR Detail with comment added to thread |

---

## 4.12 API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/approve` | POST | Approve (advance) PR to next stage |
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/reject` | POST | Reject PR (status → VOID) |
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/return` | POST | Return PR to previous stage |
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/comments` | POST | Add comment to PR thread |
